heading: MongoDB AI Cluster Assistant and Usage Information
body:
The MongoDB AI Cluster Assistant is an AI assistant that is designed to
answer questions about MongoDB's cluster features and offer recommendations
to create or upgrade a cluster. You can directly apply that recommendation
in Atlas to create or upgrade your cluster. The chatbot is powered by
generative AI and may give inaccurate responses. See our [Generative AI FAQ](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/faq-ai-features) for more information.

The chatbot is available within the Atlas UI.
